title: Noah Lucas homepage v030 rounded glass and mobile logo strip
changeSummary: Restores the rounded outer pane and hero corners from the prior glass treatment.
Shows Sift, Anduril Industries, Serve Robotics, and Postmates in the mobile employer strip.
Keeps Pendulum, Expedia, and S&P Capital IQ available in the wider desktop strip.
Preserves the v029 glass thickness states and proof-first work hierarchy.
Leaves the production pointer and live Squarespace site unchanged.

validation.method: Local HTTP server plus in-app browser at 1280x720 and 390x844.
checks: Desktop pane radius is 30px and mobile pane radius is 22px.
Mobile visible logo set matches the requested four employers.
Desktop retains all seven employer marks.
No browser console warnings or errors were observed.
